text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After my predecessor retired, I suddenly found myself in charge of
Team Sirius.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At first, I was simply focused on getting our team up and running
again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But I came to understand that every Umamusume has a dream...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And soon I came to see the role our team and I play in bringing racers
closer to those dreams.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: So I ran hand in hand with these racers, their dreams in our sights.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And I'm sure I'll see all sorts of dreams after this too...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
So this is where you were, Trainer. We have plenty of time before the
main race today, don't we?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
We're about to see the best in Japan take on the grand prix, so I
wanted to get us a good seat.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Now that I think about it, this racecourse—this very race is
where it all began.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: It feels so long ago, yet recent at the same time... Weird, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: It feels so long ago, yet recent at the same time... Weird, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I was thinking the exact same thing.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Thank you for sticking with Team Sirius back then.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Thank you for sticking with Team Sirius back then.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Without you, I would never have made it this far.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Without you, I would never have made it this far.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I could say the same thing to you... I'm sure my teammates feel the
same way as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You've always been by our sides. It was only thanks to your support
that we've come this far.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Without you, we wouldn't be able to run as we do today.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Is that so...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Another year draws to its dramatic conclusion as fourteen racers make
their way to the racecourse for the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
With over half the roster being G1 Umamusume, this battle of the
century has got the crowd ready for a show!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Among these racers, just who will claim victory and bask in the glory
of the grand prix?!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Just a while ago, if you had told me I'd be racing in the grand prix, I
wouldn't have believed you.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Tsuru...

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: To be honest, I'm still a little upset that I couldn't run in the Classics...

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
President Rudolf, a Triple Crown champion herself, is my idol, and
I've wanted to run in those races for as long as I can remember.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho, the Japanese Derby, the Kikuka Sho... You only get
one chance to enter the Classics, and I missed mine.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
And sure, I didn't make that dream come true, but I found a new
dream along the way.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: I absolutely, positively had to run with all of you!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to catch up to you guys, to run alongside you... and then
beat you all!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't have had that goal if I hadn't been watching you guys race!
Thank you for giving me my new dream!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: As payback, I'll be running with aaall my heart today!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Same! I'm going to give this race my everything!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Inhale... exhale...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: All those hours of training have led me to today...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Ryan will be with me in spirit, so I know I will be the one past the
finish line first.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Bright... She's so focused...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Which means I need to take this race just as seriously as her!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Thank you for waiting for me, Spe. At long last, this day has come.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Grass...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Your Japan Cup performance was perfection. True to our promise, you
became the Umamusume I wish to defeat the most.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Today will be the day I leave that racer behind as I surge forward.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Likewise, I'm definitely gonna pass you this time!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: If I want to be the best racer in Japan, I have to beat you!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Today's racers are now making their way to the Nakayama Racecourse
for today's main race, the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The self-proclaimed successor to the Golden Generation—T.M. Opera
O!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She may seem calm, but inside her burns a proud fire! The Mejiro's
premier stayer, Mejiro Bright!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The racer who doesn't know the meaning of "give up!" The
late-blooming secret weapon of the Golden Generation, Tsurumaru
Tsuyoshi!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Her origins lie outside Japan, but within her burns the heart of a
samurai! Champion of two grand prix races, it's Grass Wonder!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And finally, the carrier of Japan's dreams who brought us a flawless
victory, the Ruler of Japan, Special Week!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hey, Spe's finally here!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: From here... she doesn't seem nervous at all.

text_block_list.name: Sincere Umamusume
text_block_list.text: In fact, she's glowing with confidence!

text_block_list.name: Upbeat Umamusume
text_block_list.text: That's the best racer in Japan for you! We need to do our best to cheer her on!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Go get 'em, Speee! Goooo!

text_block_list.name: Caring Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Go get 'em, Ruler of Japaaan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Trainer, you need to make sure she hears your cheers too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
After all, if she wins, she might become another person's best racer in
Japan.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yes, and this race may be the link that connects another aspiring
racer to Team Sirius.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I wonder who will join the team next.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
No matter who they are, I'll do everything I can to make their dream
comes true.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: And we shall be right alongside you, just like today!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: All right! Show 'em how Team Sirius races, Spe!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: All right! Show 'em how Team Sirius races, Spe!
